fields.label: Bot Token
fields.helpText: Discord bot token from the Developer Portal (Bot section)

fields.label: Application ID
fields.helpText: Discord application ID from the Developer Portal

fields.label: Allowed Server IDs
fields.helpText: Restrict to specific servers. Leave empty to allow all servers the bot is in.

fields.label: Allow Direct Messages
fields.helpText: Whether the bot responds to direct messages

fields.label: Require @mention in servers
fields.helpText: If enabled, the bot only responds when mentioned in server channels. Always responds in DMs and threads.
